title: Choosing Your Future: University or Vocational School?
passage:
Choosing Your Future: University or Vocational School?

After finishing high school, students have to make a big choice. Many students choose to go to university. This is called higher education. Other students choose to go to vocational school. This is called vocational training or skills training. Both choices are very good, but they are different in many ways.

University is a traditional choice. At university, students usually study for three or four years. They spend a lot of time reading books, listening to teachers, and writing essays. They study subjects like science, business, history, or languages. University education helps people get professional office jobs. For example, you can become a manager, a teacher, a doctor, or a scientist. However, university is often very expensive. Students also need to study for a long time before they can start working.

Vocational training is a practical choice. At vocational school, students learn specific skills for a job. They work with their hands and use tools. Students usually study for only one or two years. They learn to do jobs like mechanic, electrician, plumber, builder, or chef. This training is very fast and costs less money than university. Students can finish their classes and start working to earn money quickly.

Which choice is better? It depends on the student. If a student likes reading, writing, and learning about theories, university is a great choice. If a student likes active work, fixing things, and wants to start a job quickly, vocational training is perfect.

In the past, many people thought university was the only way to get a good job. Today, this is changing. Many companies need workers with practical skills. Electricians and mechanics often earn very good money. Therefore, both university degrees and vocational certificates are highly valued by employers today.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: How long do students usually study at university?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 trong bài viết rõ: 'At university, students usually study for three or four years.' Không cần biến đổi từ ngữ.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What do university students do a lot?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 ghi rõ các hoạt động của sinh viên đại học: 'They spend a lot of time reading books, listening to teachers, and writing essays.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Which job can you get after going to vocational school?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 3 liệt kê các công việc của trường nghề: 'They learn to do jobs like mechanic, electrician, plumber, builder, or chef.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why do some students choose vocational training?

options.C: Because it is fast and costs less money
options.D: Because they want to write essays

questions.explanation: Đoạn 3 giải thích lý do chọn học nghề: 'This training is very fast and costs less money than university.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.

options.TRUE: If the statement agrees with the information
options.FALSE: If the statement contradicts the information
options.NOT GIVEN: If there is no information on this

questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 ghi rõ: 'However, university is often very expensive.' Thông tin hoàn toàn trùng khớp.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Vocational students study for five years.

options.TRUE: If the statement agrees with the information
options.FALSE: If the statement contradicts the information
options.NOT GIVEN: If there is no information on this

questions.explanation: Đoạn 3 ghi học sinh trường nghề chỉ học 1-2 năm: 'Students usually study for only one or two years.' Thông tin 5 năm là sai.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.

options.TRUE: If the statement agrees with the information
options.FALSE: If the statement contradicts the information
options.NOT GIVEN: If there is no information on this

questions.explanation: Bài đọc chỉ nói 'you can become a manager, a teacher, a doctor, or a scientist' (bạn có thể trở thành...), chứ không nói tất cả sinh viên đều trở thành giáo viên.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Electricians and mechanics often earn very good money.

options.TRUE: If the statement agrees with the information
options.FALSE: If the statement contradicts the information
options.NOT GIVEN: If there is no information on this

questions.explanation: Đoạn cuối viết rõ: 'Electricians and mechanics often earn very good money.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 1 viết: 'Many students choose to go to university. This is called higher education.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: At vocational school, students learn specific ____________ for a job.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 3 viết: 'At vocational school, students learn specific skills for a job.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Many companies today need workers with ____________ skills.
questions.explanation: Đoạn cuối viết: 'Many companies need workers with practical skills.'

vocabulary.meaning: giáo dục đại học / sau đại học
bài tiểu luận, bài văn ngắn

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài cho trình độ A1-A2

1. Tìm từ khóa trực tiếp: Ở trình độ này, các câu hỏi sử dụng từ vựng giống hệt trong bài đọc (ít paraphrase). Hãy tìm các từ khóa nổi bật như 'expensive', 'years', 'skills' để định vị đoạn văn chứa câu trả lời.

2. Đọc kỹ số lượng từ giới hạn: Với dạng điền từ (Sentence Completion), chú ý luật 'NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS'. Chỉ điền tối đa 2 từ và từ đó phải xuất hiện chính xác trong bài đọc.

3. Mẹo True/False/Not Given: Nếu câu hỏi có từ mang tính tuyệt đối như 'All' (tất cả), hãy kiểm tra kỹ xem bài đọc có khẳng định 100% như vậy không. Nếu bài đọc chỉ liệt kê ví dụ, đáp án thường là Not Given.
